hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('file_path','').replace('\\','/'); subprocess.run(['uv','run','ruff','check','--fix',f]) if f.endswith('.py') and ('/src/' in f or '/tests/' in f or '/scripts/' in f) else None"

python -c "import sys,json,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('file_path',''); subprocess.run(['uv','run','pytest','tests/autoscrapper/ocr','-q','--tb=short']) if 'autoscrapper/ocr' in f else None"

python -c "import sys,json,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('file_path',''); subprocess.run(['uv','run','pytest','tests/autoscrapper/','-q','--tb=short']) if 'autoscrapper/scanner' in f else None"

python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('file_path',''); c=d.get('new_string',''); ok='inventory_vision.py' in f and any(k in c for k in ['_NORM','_OFFSET_','_WIDTH_','_HEIGHT_']); print('REMINDER: coordinate space invariant — any bbox from OCR over a 2x image must be halved before use in original-space operations. Verify find_action_bbox_by_ocr callers.') if ok else None"

python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('file_path',''); c=d.get('new_string',''); ocr_files=any(x in f for x in ['inventory_vision.py','tesseract.py']); has_thresh=any(k in c for k in ['threshold','THRESHOLD','score_cutoff','fuzzy']); print('WARNING: threshold constant changed — see TODO T001. Corpus replay required before shipping a new value.') if ocr_files and has_thresh else None"

python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('file_path','').replace('\\\\','/').replace('\\','/'); print('REMINDER: config.py changed — bump CONFIG_VERSION if you added/removed/renamed any dataclass field. Load-bearing: persisted configs silently lose new fields without a version bump.') if f.endswith('autoscrapper/config.py') else None"

python -c "import sys,json,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('file_path','').replace('\\','/'); subprocess.run(['uv','run','ruff','format',f]) if f.endswith('.py') and ('/src/' in f or '/tests/' in f or '/scripts/' in f) else None"

python -c "import sys,json,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('file_path','').replace('\\','/'); subprocess.run(['uv','run','basedpyright','src/']) if f.endswith('.py') and ('/src/' in f or '/tests/' in f) else None"

python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('file_path',''); blocked=any(p in f for p in ['progress/data','items_rules.default.json']); print('BLOCK: use uv run python scripts/update_snapshot_and_defaults.py instead') if blocked else None; sys.exit(1 if blocked else 0)"

python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('file_path',''); print('BLOCK: uv.lock must not be hand-edited. Run uv add/remove/sync instead.') if f.endswith('uv.lock') else None; sys.exit(1 if f.endswith('uv.lock') else 0)"
